title: Savory Crumbly Indian Potato Cumber
description: A kid-friendly polish dish featuring kabse spice and egg-free-friendly tempering method for a savory crumbly texture.

ingredients.name: kabse spice mix (turmeric, cumin seeds, coriander powder)

instructions: Peel and chop potatoes into small cubes.
Chop onions finely and sauté in oil until translucent.
Add potato cubes, salt, and kabse spice mix to the onion mixture. Cook over medium heat for about 5 minutes.
Pour curd over the mixture and continue cooking until all liquid is absorbed (about 3 more minutes).
Turn off heat and cool slightly before shaping into small patties or crumbles.
Serve as a snack or side dish.
